title: Promise and Agency
objective: Make the opening irresistible and define what the player can actually do inside the thriller.
storyQuestions: What danger, mystery, or social threat arrives inside the first two scenes?
What can the player actually choose to do besides reading exposition?
What first choice changes information, trust, or risk in a visible way?
baseAcceptanceChecks: A first-time reader can state the central mystery after the opening.
The first interactive choice alters the next scene, available clue, or relationship pressure.
